new_terms.context: The equivalent of the Bianca board in VR NVL72, housing Rubin GPUs and Vera CPUs.
Front-side module housing ConnectX-9 NICs and transceiver cages.
Inference Context Memory Storage; a platform/fabric dedicated to KV cache traffic.
A purpose-built network tier optimized for ephemeral, recomputable KV cache.
Advanced Secure Trusted Resource Architecture for unified management of front-end and back-end networks.
Connectors like Paladin HD2 used to eliminate internal cables in the compute tray.
A vertical bridge for PCIe signals between the front and back modules of the chassis.
